products.description_html:
Dawlance Split AC Inverter1.5 Ton DAC-Mega Flex 30

The DAWLANCE 1.5 TON INVERTER SPLIT AC Model 30 MEGA FLEX INV is a really good air conditioner. It cools your room well and saves energy too. It uses smart technology to work better and keep you comfortable.

Benefits:

Quick Cooling: This air conditioner cools your room fast, so you feel comfortable quickly.

Power Adjustment: You can change how much electricity it uses to match what you need, making it work better while using less power.

Heating & Cooling: With just one button, you can switch between cooling and heating, so it keeps you comfy in any weather.

Features:

There are different features in Dawlance split AC Inverter DAC-Mega Flex 30.

Gen Mode

With Gen Mode, you can pick from three power levels for the unit and adjust how much electricity it uses according to your preference.

Health Filters

The air conditioner comes with 6 different health filters: Photocatalyst Filter, Active Carbon Filter, Anti-dust Static Filter, Catechin Filter, Silver Ion Filter, and Vitamin C Filter.

Fast Cooling

Dawlance air conditioners are ideal for keeping your home or business cool. They cool down your space quickly, so you can feel comfortable in no time.

Auto Cleaning of AC Interior

Now you can clean the inside of your Split AC, including the evaporator, from dust particles with our Self Cleaning Feature. This gives you clean and hygienic air for your family and also helps prolong the life of the indoor coils.

Heat & Cool

Our Multi-functional Air Conditioners now have you covered for both summer and winter. With the Dual Technology of Cooling & Heating, you can switch between the two with just one touch of a button.

Gold Fin

This floor-standing air conditioning unit comes with upgraded Hydrophilic & Heat technology, which helps protect it from rust and corrosive substances.

4D Airflow

Enjoy 4-dimensional cooling with horizontal and vertical swing action, ensuring better airflow and consistent cooling throughout the room.

  • AI Energy Mode: Adjusts brightness based on surroundings to save energy.

Design

products.name: Vatti Built In Oven (O-7516)
products.description_html:
Vatti Built In Oven (O-7516)

The Vatti O-7516 Built-in Oven is a spacious 75-liter electric oven designed to make cooking easy and convenient for families. Its large capacity lets you bake, roast, grill, and defrost multiple dishes at the same time, making it perfect for everyday use.

With 2000 watts of power, this oven heats quickly and cooks food evenly. It comes with convection, grill, bake, roast, and defrost functions, giving you the flexibility to prepare a wide variety of meals, from baked desserts to roasted meats and grilled vegetables.

The oven features a 3D heating element with a cooling fan, which ensures uniform heat distribution, so your food cooks evenly without hot spots. The analog controls with a digital timer make it easy to set the cooking mode and monitor cooking time accurately.

Made from stainless steel, the Vatti O-7516 is durable, stylish, and easy to clean. Its built-in design allows it to fit seamlessly into standard kitchen spaces, combining convenience and elegance.

In short, the Vatti O-7516 Built-in Oven is a reliable, versatile, and user-friendly kitchen appliance that delivers consistent, high-quality cooking results for every meal.

This oven features a 3-layer door with cool-door technology, keeping the outside surface safe to touch while retaining heat inside for even cooking. The touch control panel is simple to use, and the large LCD display makes it easy to set cooking modes and monitor progress.

With 9 cooking functions and a convection fan, the Vatti O-7519 provides uniform heat distribution, ensuring your food cooks evenly every time. Its elegant and modern design adds style to your kitchen while being highly functional.

Built with high-quality materials, this built-in electric oven is durable and long-lasting. It is also easy to install in standard kitchen spaces, making it a practical choice for any home.

products.name: Haier Built in Oven (HOX-FP3AGBX-PK13)
products.description_html:
Haier Built in Oven (HOX-FP3AGBX-PK13)

The Haier HOX-FP3AGBX-PK13 Built-in Oven is a spacious and modern electric oven designed for convenient and efficient cooking at home. With a 76-liter capacity, it provides plenty of room to bake, grill, roast, and cook meals for the entire family.

This oven comes with 13 cooking functions, giving you the flexibility to prepare a wide variety of dishes. Its convection system circulates hot air evenly, ensuring food cooks faster and more evenly every time.

The touch control panel makes it easy to select cooking modes and adjust settings, while the accurate temperature control ensures precise heating for perfect results, whether you are baking cakes, roasting meats, or grilling vegetables.

For safety and convenience, the oven features a 3-layer glass door that keeps heat inside while staying cool on the outside. The telescopic guide allows trays to slide smoothly in and out, and the internal light lets you check your food without opening the door.

This built-in oven also includes practical accessories like a deep tray and a grill shelf, making it versatile for different cooking styles. Its compact size of 595 × 567 × 595 mm fits standard built-in kitchen spaces seamlessly.

In short, the Haier HOX-FP3AGBX-PK13 Built-in Oven is a reliable, user-friendly, and versatile electric oven that makes cooking easier and more enjoyable for every household.

products.description_html:
Canon BOV-80E-23 Built-in Oven – 65 Liter Electric Oven

The Canon BOV-80E-23 Built-in Oven is a 65-liter electric oven designed to make everyday cooking simple and efficient. Its modern steel finish gives your kitchen a clean and stylish look while offering durability for long-term use.

This oven includes 6 cooking functions, making it easy to bake, grill, roast, and prepare many different meals. The mechanical timer allows you to set cooking times accurately, while the built-in cooling fan helps keep the oven safe by reducing heat during use.

The three-layer half-clear glass door keeps the heat inside the oven while letting you check your food without opening the door. With its convection fan, the oven spreads heat evenly so your food cooks properly from all sides.

The Canon BOV-80E-23 also comes with handy accessories, including a grill wire, a baking tray, and a rotisserie with a telescopic shelf, giving you more cooking options for different recipes.

Overall, the Canon BOV-80E-23 Built-in Electric Oven is easy to use, reliable, and perfect for families who want a simple and efficient baking and cooking experience in their kitchen.

products.name: Haier Digital Inverter Refrigerator HRF-346 IFGA (Green)
products.description_html:
Haier Refrigerator HRF-346 IFGA (Green)

The Haier HRF-346 IFGA Green Refrigerator is spacious, with 346 liters of storage—223 liters for the fridge and 93 liters for the freezer. It's a good fit for most kitchens, measuring 1650x595x605 mm.

This fridge uses direct cooling and has an inverter compressor, which means it runs efficiently and can handle voltage changes from 105V to 260V. Plus, it comes with turbo cooling and a humidity control system to keep your food fresh. LED lighting and adjustable shelves make organizing groceries easy.

The Dawlance REF 9140 WB E-Chrome Hairline Golden refrigerator is both stylish and practical. It cools efficiently thanks to its Direct Cool technology. Its sleek hairline gold color adds a classy look to any kitchen.

products.name: Samsung Upright Inverter RZ32M71207F / RR39M73107F Pigeon-Pair
products.description_html:
Samsung Upright Inverter RZ32M71207F / RR39M73107F Pigeon-Pair Specifications:

  • Brand:  Samsung
  • Model:  Upright Inverter RZ32M71207F / RR39M73107F (IN) Pigeon-Pair

    Refrigerator

    Introducing the Samsung Upright Inverter Refrigerator Duo, featuring the RZ32M71207F and RR39M73107F models. These fridges are designed to cool efficiently and provide plenty of space for your groceries. With capacities of 375 liters and 390 liters respectively, they can hold all your food. The All-Around Cooling system ensures that temperatures stay even throughout the fridge, while LED lights inside make it easy to find what you need.

    Need to chill something quickly? Just turn on the Power Cool function. Plus, you can relax knowing that the fridge has handy features like reversible doors, a door alarm, and a lock & key.

    It's also ready for a Smart Dongle, has a sleek external display, and a simple-to-open handle. Made with refined steel, these fridges run quietly at 39 decibels and even have a vacation mode for when you're away.

    Freezer

    Get ready to freeze efficiently with the Samsung Upright Inverter freezer. It has a big space for all your frozen stuff, with 315 liters of net capacity and 330 liters. It keeps everything evenly chilled with its All-Around Cooling tech. Plus, the LED light inside helps you easily see what's in there.

    Need things frozen fast? Use the Power Freeze feature. It's got handy extras like doors you can switch around, an alarm for when the door's left open, and a lock & key for security. You can even connect it to a Smart Dongle for extra smarts.

    The outside is sleek steel, and it runs quietly at just 39 dBA, so no noisy interruptions.

products.name: Beetro Room Air Cooler Y-90C
products.category: Room Air Cooler Price In Pakistan
products.description_html:
Beetro Room Air Cooler Y-90C

The Beetro Y-90C air cooler is a dependable way to beat the heat. It runs on regular household electricity and has a powerful fan that spins at 1350 rotations per minute. It's got a safety sensor to keep things safe during use, and its motor is made mostly of pure copper, which makes it durable and efficient.

It can throw cool air a long way, and it even works during power outages because it's UPS enabled. With a big 90-liter water tank and two ice gel bottles, it can keep you cool for a long time. You can control the speed of the fan, and it's easy to move around thanks to its strong wheels. Plus, it's made of tough plastic that can handle shocks and won't rust. It also has two thick cooling pads to keep things extra chilly and clean.

Specifications:

  • Brand:  Beetro
  • Model: Y-90C 
  • Voltage:  220V, 50Hz
  • RPM: 1350
  • Safety Sensor:  Yes
  • Copper Motor:  99.9% Pure Copper Motor
  • Air Throw:  Long Air Throw
  • UPS Enabled:  Yes
  • Tank Capacity:  90 Liter Tank Capacity
  • Motor:  Motorized Louver Powerful Motor
  • Body:  Shock & Rust Proof Plastic Body
  • Ice Gel Bottle:  2 Ice Gel Bottles
  • Speed Control function:  Yes
  • Strong Wheels Movement Function:  Yes
  • Cooling Pads:  2 Thick Anti-Bacterial Honeycomb Cooling Pads

FAQS

How often do I need to refill the water tank of the Beetro Y-90C air cooler?
The water tank has a large capacity of 90 liters, so it depends on usage, but generally, it won't need frequent refills.

Can I use the Beetro Y-90C air cooler during power outages?
Yes, its UPS enabled, so it can continue to operate even when there's no electricity.

Is the Beetro Y-90C air cooler easy to move around?
Yes, it has strong wheels for easy movement, making it convenient to relocate within your home or office.

How effective is the cooling performance of the Beetro Y-90C air cooler?
With its long air throw capability and two thick cooling pads, the Beetro Y-90C provides efficient cooling for a comfortable environment.

Is the Beetro Y-90C air cooler durable?
Yes, it's made of shock and rust-proof plastic, and its motor is made of 99.9% pure copper, ensuring durability and a long lifespan with minimal maintenance.

The Cherry CR-5100 is a large air cooler with an 80-liter water tank, perfect for cooling big rooms. It weighs 28.3 kg net and 31.2 kg gross, making it easy to move. The cooler has three simple control knobs and an auto swing feature to spread cool air evenly. You can load three ice bottles on the top for extra cooling.

It allows you to direct the airflow up and down and includes thermal overload protection to prevent overheating. The fan spins at 1320 RPM and has specially designed blades for better air circulation. The cooler uses a three-sided honeycomb cooling system for efficiency.

It operates at 255W, 50 Hz, and 220V, ensuring energy-efficient performance. The packaging size is 1170 x 612 x 812 mm, making it compact for transport and storage.

The Cherry CR-5100 has a user-friendly control panel with three knobs for adjusting settings and an auto swing feature to distribute cool air evenly.
